summary: Verified multi-tab edit modal for predios nuevos in Pendientes.js. All features working correctly: Edit button appears in 'Mis Creaciones', modal opens with 4 tabs (Básico, R1-Jurídico, R2-Físico, Propietarios), data loads correctly, save works, código predial is preserved, toast shows success, and historial is updated.

edit_button_in_mis_creaciones.description: Edit button with data-testid='edit-predio-{id}' appears for gestor creador in 'Mis Creaciones' tab

modal_opens_with_4_tabs.description: Modal opens with 4 tabs: Básico, R1-Jurídico, R2-Físico, Propietarios

data_loads_correctly.description: All predio data loads correctly in the form fields

save_changes_works.description: Guardar Cambios button works and updates the predio via PATCH /api/predios-nuevos/{id}

codigo_predial_preserved.description: Código predial nacional is NOT modified when editing (protected field)

success_toast_shown.description: Toast 'Predio actualizado correctamente' appears after save

historial_updated.description: Historial del predio is updated with 'Predio actualizado' entry after save

critical_code_review_comments: ✓ Frontend Pendientes.js lines 122-197: openPredioEditor function correctly extracts r1, r2, and propietarios data
✓ Frontend Pendientes.js lines 225-258: handleSavePredioChanges correctly sends PATCH request with all data
✓ Frontend Pendientes.js lines 2306-2820: Modal with 4 tabs implemented correctly
✓ Backend server.py lines 10874-10926: PATCH endpoint correctly protects codigo_predial_nacional and updates historial
✓ Protected fields (id, codigo_predial_nacional, gestor_creador_id, created_at, historial_flujo) cannot be modified

success_rate.backend: 100% (8/8 tests passed, 2 skipped due to no test data)

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing predio nuevo with código 541280002000000030237000000000 for testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multi-tab edit modal for predios nuevos is fully functional. The predio with código 541280002000000030237000000000 in Cáchira was used for testing. The gestor creador (gestor.creador@test.com) can edit predios in 'Mis Creaciones' tab. All 4 tabs (Básico, R1-Jurídico, R2-Físico, Propietarios) work correctly. The historial now has 9 entries after testing.
